# 5cut

5cut is an iOS app for recording lectures and meetings, removing silence, generating on-device transcripts and subtitles, live-translating in 30+ languages, and exporting study notes.

Key pages:
- https://get5cut.com/
- https://get5cut.com/transcribe-lectures/
- https://get5cut.com/offline-lecture-transcription-iphone/
- https://get5cut.com/remove-silence-from-lectures/
- https://get5cut.com/record-meetings-privately-iphone/
- https://get5cut.com/offline-meeting-notes-iphone/
- https://get5cut.com/podcast-silence-remover/
- https://get5cut.com/smartphone-video-editor/
- https://get5cut.com/best-app-for-law-school-recordings/
- https://get5cut.com/best-app-for-medical-school-lectures/
- https://get5cut.com/free-jumpcut-app/
- https://get5cut.com/use-cases/remove-silence-from-zoom/
- https://get5cut.com/use-cases/remove-silence-from-obs/
- https://get5cut.com/alternatives/timebolt-alternative/
- https://get5cut.com/privacy/
- https://get5cut.com/support/

Product:
- Record or import lectures, meetings, interviews, podcasts, and talking-head videos.
- Remove silence, create transcripts and subtitles, label speakers, batch process recordings, and export study notes.
- Current purchase options and regional pricing are shown in the App Store.

Privacy:
- Media processing is on-device.
- No account is required.
- Audio and video are not uploaded to 5cut servers.
